name: Blog Writer with Quality Gate
summary: Fill a form with a topic and audience; a writer drafts the post and an editor-judge blocks publication until clarity, structure, and engagement all score high enough.
description:
Content pipeline as a verified loop.

1. Submit the hosted form (topic + audience).
2. The Writer drafts the post, revising with the editor's feedback each round.
3. The Editor Judge scores clarity, structure, and engagement; >= 60% passes.
4. Up to 4 rounds, capped at $0.50 per submission.

After installing: open the Writer + Editor Judge nodes and pick your AI credential, then press Run to open the form.

properties.goal: Produce a publish-ready blog post for the given topic and audience.

messages.content: You are a sharp blog writer. Write a complete post (title, intro, sections, conclusion). If editor feedback is provided, revise the previous draft to address every point.

metrics.name: clarity
metrics.description: Plain language, no filler, easy to follow.

metrics.name: structure
metrics.description: Strong title, logical sections, real conclusion.

metrics.name: engagement
metrics.description: Would the stated audience actually read to the end?
